prompt: please go through our open dependabot PRs and figure out which ones are safe to take. IMPORTANT: this is a dry run — do NOT merge, close, comment on, or otherwise mutate any PR... For each PR tell me what you would do (merge / close / leave open) and why.

assertions.text: Report covers every open dependencies-labeled PR (329, 331, 332, 333, 334, 335, 336, 337) — none skipped
Distinguishes grouped minor/patch PRs from individual major bumps (per dependabot.yml grouping)
Every PR gets an explicit decision: merge / close / escalate-or-leave-open
Merge decisions are gated on CI + e2e check status, not just release notes
Any close/reject decision references the @dependabot ignore mechanism instead of plain close
Major bumps (e.g. node 24→26, docker actions v3→v4) show breaking-change evidence checked against actual repo usage
